Academics

Excellence in Learning from ECD to Grade 9

At Greencrest Advent School, we offer a comprehensive academic program that challenges students to achieve their highest potential while integrating faith with learning. Our curriculum follows the Kenyan national curriculum, enhanced with Adventist education principles.

Early Childhood Development (ECD)

Our ECD program provides a nurturing foundation for young learners, focusing on holistic development through play-based learning, structured activities, and age-appropriate academic preparation.

  • • Age-appropriate curriculum focusing on literacy, numeracy, and life skills
  • • Play-based learning that encourages creativity and exploration
  • • Character development through stories, songs, and daily routines
  • • Safe, caring environment with experienced early childhood educators
  • • Preparation for smooth transition to primary school

Lower Primary (Grades 1-3)

Lower Primary builds on the foundation laid in ECD, developing essential literacy and numeracy skills while fostering curiosity and a love for learning.

  • • Core subjects: English, Kiswahili, Mathematics, Science, Social Studies, Religious Education
  • • Emphasis on reading fluency, writing skills, and mathematical thinking
  • • Creative arts, music, and physical education integrated into the curriculum
  • • Character education woven into daily lessons and activities
  • • Individual attention to ensure every child progresses at their pace

Upper Primary (Grades 4-6)

Upper Primary deepens academic knowledge and skills while preparing students for the transition to junior school. Students develop greater independence and critical thinking abilities.

  • • Expanded curriculum with more specialized subject areas
  • • Project-based learning that encourages research and presentation skills
  • • Preparation for KPSEA with comprehensive revision and exam techniques
  • • Leadership opportunities through class responsibilities and student council
  • • Enhanced focus on problem-solving and analytical thinking

Junior School (Grades 7-9)

Junior School provides a rigorous academic program that prepares students for secondary education while continuing to develop character, leadership, and service-oriented mindsets.

  • • Comprehensive curriculum aligned with national standards
  • • Subject specialization with qualified teachers in each discipline
  • • Preparation for KPSEA and transition to secondary school
  • • Enhanced critical thinking, research, and independent study skills
  • • Leadership development and mentorship programs
  • • Career guidance and academic counseling

Academic Excellence

Our commitment to academic excellence is reflected in our qualified teaching staff, well-equipped classrooms, and supportive learning environment. We believe every child can achieve their potential with the right support and encouragement.

No Child Left Behind

Qualified Teachers

Experienced, dedicated educators committed to student success

Modern Facilities

Well-equipped classrooms and learning resources

Individual Support

Personalized attention to help each student thrive
